message:
fix: guard against nil pointer in RewardsHandler.fetchUserRewardsForBadge (#9411)

Add nil checks for entry.response before dereferencing cached rewards
entries in rewards_badge.go and rewards.go. A nil response pointer in
the cache map would cause a SIGSEGV panic crashing the backend.

- rewards_badge.go: return errBadgeUnknownLogin when cached response is nil
- rewards.go (fresh cache): skip cache hit when response is nil
- rewards.go (stale fallback): skip stale entry when response is nil

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
